description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a predominantly blue and yellow color scheme accented by white and black details. The front section is streamlined with a glossy yellow hood and white lower hull, designed to cut through water efficiently. Two large, black and yellow jet propulsion units are mounted at the rear, flanking a contoured blue seat with a backrest for the rider. The cockpit area includes a black steering wheel and visible control panel, with side panels in blue and yellow. The overall build suggests a sturdy plastic or fiberglass shell with metallic and rubber components for structural and functional integrity. The design is compact, with a low profile and wide stance for stability on water.
description: A compact, blue and yellow jet ski with a streamlined body, rear jet propulsion units, and a contoured seat for one rider. Features include a black steering wheel, glossy finish, and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, yellow hood, white hull, and the tops of the rear jet propulsion units.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the contoured blue seat, black steering wheel, and the full length of the jet propulsion units at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin jet propulsion units, the backrest of the seat, and the steering wheel through the open cockpit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the seat, steering wheel, and propulsion units from the other side.
attribute_handlebar_design: Black, circular steering wheel with a simple, solid structure and no visible grips or controls.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single contoured blue seat with a backrest, designed for one rider, featuring a smooth surface and integrated into the main body.
